deepRecoveryTasks.reason: No Tier 1 USCE source family (observership / visiting student / clinical elective) was captured. The 20 sources are clinical condition / treatment / research pages with no relevance to USCE.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch of ufhealth.org and med.ufl.edu observership/visiting-student/international-medical-graduate pages (e.g. com.ufl.edu international electives, med.ufl.edu/education/visiting-students).

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: Sources mis-tagged as GME_PAGE are actually condition / treatment pages. No real GME / residency / fellowship page was captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch of UF College of Medicine GME index (med.ufl.edu/gme, ufhealth.org careers/gme) and program directories.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: No careers / physician-jobs / faculty-recruitment page was captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow fetch of ufhealth.org/careers and UF physician/faculty recruitment pages.

metadata.sourceFamilyMistaggingNote: 16 of 20 sources tagged GME_PAGE/RESEARCH_PAGE are actually clinical condition/treatment/research-study pages with zero USCE relevance. Source-family classifier upstream needs review.

unresolveds: No Tier 1, Tier 2, or Tier 3 source family was meaningfully captured. Sources are clinical condition/treatment pages mistagged as GME/RESEARCH. The search was effectively unsearched for USCE intent.
verdictSummary: Zero merged claims, but coverage is FAIL_WEAK on all three tiers — captured sources are clinical condition/treatment/research-study pages mistagged as GME_PAGE/RESEARCH_PAGE, with no observership, visiting-student, GME index, or careers page actually fetched. This is under-extraction, not genuine absence; human review and A4 narrow recovery required before declaring UF Health Shands has no public USCE.
